description: Now-dead code: tagged_return_fns/_specs derivations, tagged_slot0_cont_specs build loop (replaced by per-callsite annotation), resolve_tcc_body, naturally_opaque CodegenEnv field, .29.11/.29.12.1 panic sites, or_else iter-find fallbacks at MakeClosure sites, skip-check at line 1914. Blocked by 3c.

comments.text:
Audit complete after 3c:
- Dispatch-path resolves (emit_terminator x2, MakeClosure lower_prim): migrated.
- .29.11 / .29.12.1 panics: gone (became .expect() against the annotation invariant).
- or_else iter-find at MakeClosure lower_prim: gone.

Surviving patterns (intentional — still in use):
- closure_shapes builder (line 2275): walks module.fns to seed
  static_closure_targets BEFORE the per-spec compile loop, so annotations
  aren't available yet. Still uses resolve+or_else.
- tagged_return_fns / tagged_return_specs / tagged_slot0_cont_specs:
  analysis-only paths feeding the schema/ABI slot-0 decision; correct with
  per-spec FnTypes and don't drive dispatch.
- resolve_tcc_body and its 3 call sites: still used outside emit_terminator.
- .29.12.2 panic at closure_shapes builder: live because the builder isn't
  annotation-driven yet.

Subsuming the closure_shapes migration into 3e — it has to happen before
ensure_any_keys can land, because otherwise the closure_shapes builder will
exact-match the new any-keys for direct-only fns (the original
apply2-breaking conflation).

title: fz-aiz.3d: delete dangling patterns
